data.description: Review the full update skill (notes/update-skill-steps.md) and the artifact generation pipeline (research/asset-workflows/). Assess what works, what's missing, what needs refinement before the skill is built (ASMV-18).
data.title: Review /update skill & artifact generation pipeline

data.body:
## Review Findings — Update Skill Spec & Pipeline

### Documents Reviewed
1. notes/update-skill-steps.md — manual process spec from 2026-03-06 practice run
2. ~/.claude/commands/update.md — existing /update command (ASMV-22)
3. src/lib/content.ts — NowEntry schema
4. src/content/now/*.mdx — 4 existing entries (2026-03-03 through 2026-03-06)
5. scripts/riso_engine.py — Riso image processor
6. src/components/interactive/ArtifactBar.tsx — how artifacts surface on homepage
7. src/app/now/page.tsx — Now page rendering

### What Works Well
- Schema is solid. NowEntry in content.ts matches the spec exactly.
- Two-tier mode design (quick/developed) is well-scoped.
- The existing /update command (ASMV-22) is already functional with a complete 8-step pipeline.
- Riso engine is production-ready with clean CLI.
- File conventions are clear and consistent.
- Tag inference is a good design call for reducing friction.

### Gaps & Issues
1. Two commands, one purpose — /update (global) vs /update-site (project). Recommendation: create /update-site as project-scoped (.claude/commands/ in repo).
2. Spec mentions simplex-noise deps but /update uses Riso engine. New skill should follow Riso engine path.
3. No --no-riso passthrough in spec. Must preserve this for pre-processed images.
4. Archive step too aggressive (nukes entire raw/processed dirs). Fix: only archive session files.
5. No texture generation path integrated. Add asset-workflows scripts as generate option.
6. ASMV-51 dependency — preflight must check Python deps with helpful error.
7. Build validation conflicts with running dev server. Use parse validation when dev server active.
8. Missing voice guidance. Add studio-desk tone direction matching existing entries.

### Recommendations for ASMV-18
1. Project-scoped at .claude/commands/update-site.md
2. Based on existing /update structure with improvements
3. Quick mode default, developed mode explicit
4. Texture generation as alternative to photo input
5. Session-specific archive cleanup only
6. Smart build validation (parse vs full build)
7. Python deps preflight with fallback paths
Review gate: review-only task, no code produced. Findings recorded above. Moving to done.
